items.title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect VPN auth bypass flaw now exploited in attacks
items.description: Palo Alto Networks is warning that hackers are now exploiting a PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-0257, in attacks attempting to breach corporate networks. [...]
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] Threat Intel advisory. Risk score 7.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Low Security Vulnerability CVE-2026-7858
id: ecd0d1b4-3915-5449-aeee-06db97dacf81
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-7858 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7858
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/02
modified: 2026/06/02
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-7858 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-02T07:49:34Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-7858", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-7858 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8546752; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-02, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P4] CVE / Vulnerability - low severity (Risk 1.5/10). No MITRE ATT&CK techniques mapped - limited adversarial context. 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: UNC-CDB. AI confidence: LOW (22%) - limited source data available.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10223 - NousResearch hermes-agent memory_toolpy _scan_memory_content in
id: b129d7f0-bae5-5e4f-bdf1-34cac9e860ac
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-10223 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10223
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/02
modified: 2026/06/02
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10223 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-02T07:49:34Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-10223", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-10223 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8586667; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-02, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
